channel.title: ICYMI Law — News-like Links
channel.description: Popular news-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: What’s Actually Wrong With the Reflecting Pool (Gift Article)
item.description:
See the problems that have plagued the Lincoln Memorial pool for decades and why President Trump’s repairs might not fix them.

item.title: The Deadly Rise of Giant Trucks and S.U.V.s (Gift Article)
item.description:
The vehicles on American roads have grown larger — and they are killing thousands more pedestrians, a Times investigation found.

item.description:

item.title: Paramount Refused to Air an Ad Criticizing Its Merger With Warner Bros.
item.description:

item.title: I’m a 14-year-old trans athlete. No one should face the vicious attacks I have faced | Lina Haaga
item.description:
People understand gender differently, and I was taught to respect all ideas. But the vitriol I recently experienced was not a healthy debate

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Leak Exposes Members of Peter Thiel’s Secretive ‘Dialog’ Society
item.description:
More than 200 of the world's elites registered for a retreat whose agenda runs from panels on cult-building and sex to prepping for World War III. An associated app offers matchmaking.

item.title: The ‘Presumption of Regularity’ Is Evaporating
item.description:

item.title: Trump is taking aim at forest and wildfire research just as the West is poised to burn
